subject: New Assignment: Backend Engineer
body:
Hi,

We have a new opening in the public sector sector that might be of interest.

Our client is looking for a senior Backend Engineer with strong experience in Java. The right candidate has solid knowledge of:

  • Java
  • GCP
  • Docker Compose
  • MongoDB

Details:
Client: Förvaltningsdata AB
Start: 2024-10-18
Duration: 6 months
Location: Stockholm (hybrid)
Rate: up to 1000 SEK/h

Don't hesitate to get in touch!

Best regards,
Lena Eriksson
Business Director
TechLink Sweden
Tel: +46 73 345 67 89
